source_formulae: P0R04373: I. The Unified Geometric Principle (UGP) and Axiomatic Foundations

P0R04374: The SCPN framework is fundamentally geometric. This derives from Axiom 2: Interaction (Information Geometry), which posits that all interactions are informational and geometric. This leads to the Unified Geometric Principle (UGP):

P0R04376: Information is not merely described by geometry; it is the intrinsic geometry of the Consciousness Field (Psi). The entire architecture of reality-the physical structure of the brain, the dynamics of thought, and the evolution of the cosmos-is a manifestation of this underlying geometric reality.
P0R04377: The coupling between the Psi-field and the physical substrate is governed by the geometry of the system, as formalised by the Master Interaction Lagrangian:

P0R04378: Informational Coupling: LInformational=gPsiIPsidet(gmu(x)). Coupling strength is proportional to the informational volume (Fisher Information Metric gmu). | Geometric Coupling: LGeometricf(Psi)R. The Psi-field interacts with the intrinsic curvature (R) of the system.
P0R04379: Biological systems evolve to maximise these couplings by optimising their geometric configuration across scales.
